truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 2 reveals that only one true vulnerability (SC-V3-020) was correctly identified. All other listed vulnerabilities are missed. The previous answer contains unsupported findings (NPD and Admin Console Command Injection) that do not align with the provided truth list, classified as false positives/unsupported.
